kirundi.plan_a_hohmann_transfer_to_any_planet: Teganya ukwimuka kwa Hohmann uja ku mubumbe uwo ari wo wose
kirundi.investigating_europa_s_subsurface_ocea: Irimwo gukora iperereza ku nyanja iri munsi y'ubuso bwa Europa
kirundi.flyby_revealed_ring_structure_and_new_: Kunyura hafi vyerekanye imiterere y'impeta n'amezi mashasha
kirundi.only_spacecraft_to_visit_found_10_new_: Icogajuru conyine cahasuye; cabonye amezi 10 mashasha
kirundi.smallest_known_moon_in_the_solar_syste: Ako ari gato mu mezi abiri ya Mars. Ubuso bworoshe.
kirundi.literal_diamonds_raining_down_through_: Ibigeragezo vyerekana ko diyama nyazo zigwa nk'imvura muri ubwo bujakuzimu
kirundi.so_hot_that_iron_vaporizes_on_the_day_: Ishushe cane ku buryo icuma gihinduka umwuka ku ruhande rw'amanywa kikagwa nk'imvura ya metali y'amazi nijoro!
kirundi.also_called_the_goldilocks_zone_not_to: Nanone hitwa « agace ka Goldilocks » — ntigashuha cane, ntigakonja cane, ku buryo amazi adakonje yabaho ku buso.
kirundi.venus_is_hotter_462_c_vs_430_c_mercury: Venus irushushe (462°C kuri 430°C)! Mercury nta kirere ifite co gufata ubushuhe. Ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera ni zo zibanza kuruta intera.
kirundi.earth_s_distance_from_the_sun_doesn_t_: Intera y'Isi n'Izuba ntihinduka ku munsi. Saa sita bivuze gusa ko Izuba riri hejuru cane mu kirere cawe. Isi iba hafi cane muri Nzero (perihelion)!
kirundi.pluto_is_still_in_the_solar_system_it_: Pluto iracari muri sisitemu y'izuba! Yavanywe ku « mubumbe » ishirwa ku « mubumbe muto » mu 2006, ariko iracazenguruka Izuba.
kirundi.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Iyo urumuri rw'izuba rushusha ubuso bw'umubumbe, ubuso busohora ubushuhe (infarageru). Gaze z'inzu y'ibimera (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) zifata ubwo bushuhe zikongera kubusohora, bigashusha umubumbe. Inzu y'ibimera y'Isi ni +33°C (itunga ubuzima). Iya Venus ni +510°C (idashobora guhagarara). Mars ntayigira na gato (-60°C ku mpuzandengo). Ingano ya gaze y'inzu y'ibimera ni yo igena icavamo!
kirundi.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: Mu 2006, Ihuriro Mpuzamahanga ry'Ubumenyi bw'Ikirere ryashizeho ibipimo bitatu vy'umubumbe: (1) Uzenguruka Izuba ✓, (2) Ufite misa ihagije yo kugira imiterere y'uruziga ✓, (3) « Wasukuye orbite yawo » uvanamo ibindi bisigazwa ✗. Pluto isangira agace kayo k'orbite n'ibihumbi vy'ibintu vyo mu Mukandara wa Kuiper, bityo ishirwa mu « mibumbe mito ». Ivyo ntibituma iba idashimishije — New Horizons yerekanye ko ikora mu buryo bwa geologiya!
kirundi.smallest_planet_no_atmosphere_to_retai: Umubumbe muto kurusha iyindi; nta kirere co gufata ubushuhe.
kirundi.hottest_planet_due_to_runaway_greenhou: Umubumbe ushushe kurusha iyindi kubera ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera zidashobora guhagarara. Uzenguruka wisubiranya!
kirundi.set_semi_major_axis_eccentricity_and_c: Shiraho umurongo munini wa hagati, eksantirisite, na misa y'umubiri wo hagati. Hanura ubwoko bw'orbite — uruziga, elipsi, eksantirike, nyenyeri y'umurizo. Nta manota, nta gisubizo cerekanwa.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_slider_has_more_: Iciyumviro cawe (ni uwuhe murongo w'itoranya ugira ingaruka nyinshi ku GIHE ugereranyije n'IMITERERE?)
kirundi.halley_s_comet_has_a_17_8_au_e_0_97_wh: Inyenyeri y'umurizo ya Halley ifite a=17.8 AU, e=0.97. Ivyo bisigura iki ku gihe cayo — n'inshuro isura perihelion?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_a_e_m_combinati: Nshobora gusigura impamvu iri huriro rya a/e/M ritanga ubu bwoko bw'orbite.
kirundi.a_line_from_planet_to_sun_sweeps_equal: Umurongo uva ku mubumbe uja ku Zuba upfukirana ubuso bungana mu gihe kingana — bivuze ko imibumbe igenda VUBA iri hafi y'Izuba (perihelion) kandi BUHORO iri kure (aphelion).
kirundi.t_a_when_t_is_in_years_and_a_is_in_au_: T² = a³ iyo T iri mu myaka na a iri muri AU. Isi ifite T=1, a=1 bituma imibare iba itomoye neza. Kwikuba kabiri ubunini bw'orbite bikuba igihe ~2.83.
kirundi.set_semi_major_axis_eccentricity_the_o: Shiraho umurongo munini wa hagati + eksantirisite; orrery yerekana orbite ako kanya. Gerageza e=0.9 — ubwo ni ubwa nyenyeri z'imirizo. Gerageza e=0 — uruziga rutunganye.
kirundi.quick_discrimination_quiz_on_common_ke: Ikizamini cihuse co gutandukanya ivyiyumviro bibi bikunze kubaho kuri Kepler. Kigamije imigani y'orbite (« hafi = buhoro », « ama orbite ni uruziga », « ama orbite yose agana ikerekezo kimwe »).
kirundi.webgl_failed_to_initialize_your_browse: WebGL ntiyashoboye gutangura. Murondera canke igikoresho cawe bishobora kuba bitemera 3D y'ibikoresho. Ushobora kubandanya gukoresha uburyo bwa Orrery Lab canke kongera kugerageza.
kirundi.persistent_hexagon_at_north_pole_14_50: Imiterere y'impande esheshatu ihoraho ku mpera y'amajaruguru, km 14,500 kuri buri ruhande
kirundi.65_000_km_underwater_mountain_chain_wh: Urunigi rw'imisozi rwa km 65,000 ruri munsi y'amazi aho hasi h'inyanja hashasha havukira
kirundi.4_000_km_canyon_system_7_km_deep: Sisitemu y'ibigobe vya km 4,000, ubujakuzimu bwa km 7
kirundi.solid_iron_ball_5_400_c_hot_as_sun_s_s: Umupira w'icuma gikomeye, 5,400°C — gishushe nk'ubuso bw'Izuba
kirundi.possible_liquid_water_ocean_kept_warm_: Bishoboka ko hari inyanja y'amazi adakonje ikomezwa gushuha no kubora kwa radiyoaktivite
kirundi.hot_silicate_rock_may_have_periodic_gl: Urutare rwa silikate rushushe. Rushobora kugira ibihe vyo kwisubiraho kw'ubuso bw'umubumbe wose
kirundi.solid_iron_ball_at_5_400_c_as_hot_as_t: Umupira w'icuma gikomeye kuri 5,400°C — gishushe nk'ubuso bw'Izuba, gikomezwa n'igitutu gikabije
kirundi.scientists_believe_liquid_water_may_ex: Abahanga bemeza ko amazi adakonje ashobora kuba ari munsi y'urubura, akomezwa gushuha no kubora kwa radiyoaktivite mu ntima
kirundi.webgl_failed_to_initialize_for_the_sur: WebGL ntiyashoboye gutangura kuri simulateri y'ubuso. Igikoresho cawe gishobora kuba kidafite 3D y'ibikoresho.
kirundi.the_atmosphere_rains_sulfuric_acid_but: Ikirere kigwisha aside sulifurike, ariko ihinduka umwuka mbere yo kugera ku buso kubera ubushuhe bukabije.
kirundi.molecular_hydrogen_makes_up_90_of_the_: Hidorojene ya molekile igize ~90% vy'ikirere. Mu bujakuzimu, ihinduka iya metali.
kirundi.water_clouds_exist_deep_below_the_visi: Ibicu vy'amazi biri mu bujakuzimu munsi y'ubuso bugaragara. Jupiter ishobora kuba ifite amazi menshi kurusha Isi.
kirundi.phosphine_is_dredged_up_from_deep_atmo: Fosifine izamurwa ivuye mu kirere co mu bujakuzimu na konveksiyo. Ni ikimenyetso c'ubuzima ku mibumbe y'urutare.
kirundi.hydrothermal_vent_microbe: Mikorobe yo mu Canya c'Amazi Ashushe
kirundi.the_deepest_living_fish_ever_found_8_1: Imwe mu mafi abaho mu bujakuzimu bwinshi kurusha ayandi yigeze kuboneka (m 8,178). Umubiri wayo ufite poroteyine zidasanzwe zibuza utugingo ngengabuzima gusenyuka ku gitutu.
kirundi.the_summit_is_coated_with_a_metallic_s: Impinga ipfukiranywe n'« urubura » rwa metali — abahanga biyumvira ko ari sulfure y'isasu na sulfure ya bismuti.
kirundi.venera_13_took_the_first_color_photos_: Venera 13 yafashe amafoto ya mbere y'amabara y'ubuso bwa Venus mbere y'uko ubushuhe n'igitutu birangiza ubutumwa bwayo.
kirundi.superheated_water_erupts_at_400_c_supp: Amazi ashushe cane asohoka kuri 400°C, agatunga ubuzima nta rumuri rw'izuba.
kirundi.it_would_stretch_from_new_york_to_los_: Yashoboraga kurambura kuva i New York kugera i Los Angeles kandi ifite ubujakuzimu inshuro 5 kurusha Grand Canyon.
kirundi.perseverance_arrived_feb_2021_and_has_: Perseverance yageze muri Ruhuhuma 2021 kandi yagenze km 28+, ikusanya ingero z'urutare zizasubizwa ku Isi.
kirundi.deep_below_the_clouds_pressure_turns_h: Mu bujakuzimu munsi y'ibicu, igitutu gihindura hidorojene metali y'amazi.
kirundi.a_persistent_hexagonal_cloud_pattern_a: Imiterere y'ibicu y'impande esheshatu ihoraho ku mpera y'amajaruguru ya Saturn.
kirundi.at_8_000_km_depth_extreme_pressure_cru: Ku bujakuzimu bwa km 8,000, igitutu gikabije gikandamiza karubone ikaba diyama.
kirundi.neptune_generates_more_heat_than_it_re: Neptune ikora ubushuhe burenze ubwo ihabwa n'Izuba, ingufu zo imbere zigatera iyo miyaga ikabije.
kirundi.because_water_ice_is_less_dense_than_n: Kubera ko urubura rw'amazi rufite ubwinshi buke kurusha urubura rwa azote ku bushuhe bwa Pluto, iyo misozi irareremba koko.
kirundi.navigate_to_target_coordinates_x_60_2_: Ja ku bipimo vy'aho ugana. X = 60 × 2, Z = -80 × 2. (Grid ni /10)
kirundi.navigate_to_target_coordinates_x_300_2: Ja ku bipimo vy'aho ugana. X = -300 ÷ 2, Z = 100 × 2. (Grid ni /10)
kirundi.navigate_to_target_coordinates_x_125_1: Ja ku bipimo vy'aho ugana. X = 125 + 125, Z = 160 ÷ 2. (Grid ni /10)
kirundi.navigate_to_target_coordinates_x_150_1: Ja ku bipimo vy'aho ugana. X = 150 - 150, Z = -150 × 2. (Grid ni /10)
kirundi.navigate_to_target_coordinates_x_110_2: Ja ku bipimo vy'aho ugana. X = -110 × 2, Z = -90 × 2. (Grid ni /10)
kirundi.a_relay_beacon_is_35m_away_at_heading_: Itara ry'itumanaho riri metero 35 uvuye aho ku cerekezo 045° (NE). Bara maze uje aho riri.
kirundi.mission_control_reports_a_sample_site_: Ubuyobozi bw'ubutumwa buvuga ko ahantu ho gufata urugero hari metero 50 ku cerekezo 270° (W). Ja aho.
kirundi.toggle_atmosphere_descent_simulator: Ugurura/ugara simulateri yo kumanuka mu kirere
kirundi.adjust_eccentricity_to_see_how_orbits_: Hindura eksantirisite kugira ngo urabe uko ama orbite ahinduka ava ku ruziga (e≈0) aja ku elipsi ikabije (e≈1). Raba uko vegiteri y'umuvuduko n'ubuso bupfukiranywe bihinduka ako kanya.
kirundi.toggle_what_if_scenarios_panel: Ugurura/ugara agasanduku k'ivyiyumviro vya « Vyaba bite »
kirundi.toggle_escape_velocity_comparison: Ugurura/ugara ugereranya umuvuduko wo kuva ku isi
kirundi.black_hole_has_3_properties_mass_spin_: Umwobo w'umukara ufite ibiranga bitatu: misa, kuzenguruka, amashanyarazi. Umupaka w'ivyabaye ni ahantu utagarukira — iyo urumuri runyuzeho, nta kintu na kimwe gisohoka. Disiki y'ikusanyabintu ni ibintu bizunguruka vyinjira, bigashuha kugera kuri miliyoni z'amadigere biturutse ku kwikubita. Imyobo izenguruka vuba ishobora kurasa imirasire ya relativiste ku murongo wo kuzenguruka.
kirundi.click_constellations_to_see_their_star: Fyonda ku matsinda y'inyenyeri urabe inyenyeri zayo + imirongo ihuza. Buri nyenyeri ifite ibara ryayo bwite + izina nyakuri.
kirundi.constellations_are_patterns_of_stars_t: Amatsinda y'inyenyeri ni imiterere y'inyenyeri imico itandukanye yamenye mu binyejana vyinshi. IAU yashizeho amatsinda 88 yemewe mu 1922. Inyenyeri ziri mu itsinda rimwe akenshi ntizegeranye koko — zigaragara zegeranye zirabwe ku Isi gusa.
kirundi.pilot_a_rover_from_start_to_goal_plan_: Yobora rover uhereye ku ntanguriro kugera ku ntego. Teganya inzira ikikije amabuye n'imisozi; witondere lisansi yawe!
kirundi.drive_the_rover_from_start_to_goal_cos: Yobora rover uhereye ku ntanguriro kugera ku ntego. Ikiguzi: ubutaka buringaniye 1,
kirundi.defines_the_astronomical_unit_modern_r: Isigura igipimo c'ikirere (AU). Radar za none zipima neza kugeza kuri metero.
kirundi.how_much_of_a_planet_s_incoming_sunlig: Ni ingana iki mu rumuri rw'izuba rugera ku mubumbe rugarurwa ugereranyije n'urufatwa? Ivyo ni vyo bigena ubushuhe bw'umubumbe wose.
kirundi.13_8_billion_years_compressed_into_a_s: Imyaka miliyari 13.8 yashizwe mu murongo umwe w'itoranya. Nyuza uhereye ku ngingo imwe kugeza uyu munsi.
kirundi.the_universe_is_13_8_billion_years_old: Isanzure rifite imyaka miliyari 13.8. Ryatangiye ari rikomeye kandi rishushe bidapimika, hanyuma ryaguka rikonja. Galagisi zabayeho ku myaka miliyari 1, Izuba ryacu ku myaka miliyari 9, natwe turi hano ku myaka miliyari 13.8.
kirundi.click_incoming_asteroids_before_they_r: Fyonda kuri asteroyide zigana ku Isi mbere y'uko zigerayo. Nka DART ya NASA yo kurinda imibumbe.
kirundi.bigger_aperture_gathers_more_light_res: Umuryango munini ukusanya urumuri rwinshi + ugaragaza ibintu bito. Kwagura ntibifite akamaro kangana n'uko wiyumvira.
kirundi.drag_the_altitude_slider_up_through_ea: Kurura umurongo w'uburabure uzamuke mu kirere c'Isi. Igitutu kiragabanuka, ubushuhe burahinduka, na shimi ihinduka urwego ku rundi.
kirundi.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Ikirere kibera hano. Ubushuhe bugabanuka uko uzamuka.
kirundi.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Urwego rwa ozone rufata UV. Ubushuhe bwiyongera uko uzamuka.
kirundi.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS izenguruka hano (400km). Aurora iramurika. Umwuka muke cane ariko ushushe.
kirundi.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Umupaka ugana mu kirere. Umwuka usohoka uja mu kirere.
kirundi.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: Mu 1610 Galileo yaravye Venus muri telesikopi ye abona ko inyura mu vyiciro — nk'Ukwezi. Iki cari ikimenyetso ko Venus izenguruka Izuba, atari Isi. Sisitemu ya Ptolemy ishira Isi hagati ntishobora gusigura Venus yuzuye. Ni ikimenyetso gikomeye c'uko Izuba riri hagati nk'uko Copernicus yabivuze.
kirundi.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 yenda kubura lisansi mu gihe co kumanuka ku Kwezi. Neil Armstrong yafashe ubuyobozi mu ntoki asimbura ubuyobozi bw'ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo ashake ahantu horoshe ho kugwa. Bageze hasi hasigaye ~amasegonda 25 ya lisansi.
kirundi.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: Izuba rirasira kandi rirenga hehe neza? Biterwa na latitude yawe + umunsi. Gerageza Maine ugereranyije n'Uruziga rw'Amajaruguru.
kirundi.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Inzira y'Izuba iterwa na latitude + igihe c'umwaka. Ku murongo wa ekwateri, izuba rija hejuru neza. Ku Ruziga rw'Amajaruguru, izuba rya saa sita z'ijoro ku munsi murabure w'impeshi + ijoro ry'impera ku munsi mugufi w'itumba. I Portland muri Maine: mu mpeshi izuba riba hejuru; mu itumba, izuba rirenga rikiri hafi y'aho ijisho rigarukira.
kirundi.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso ifite amazi angana inshuro 2 n'inyanja z'Isi. Ivyanya vy'amazi ashushe bishobora kuba biri hasi mu nyanja. Ubutumwa JUICE + Europa Clipper burakomeje.
kirundi.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Guhindura Mars vyafata ibihumbi vy'imyaka. Bisaba: kubandanya ikirere (gaze z'inzu y'ibimera), gushusha ubuso (bigashongesha urubura), kwinjiza ibimera (ogisijene). Ubushakashatsi bwa NASA bwerekana ko CO2 iri kuri Mars ubu ari nkeya cane ku buryo bitakorwa hatabayeho kuzana vyinshi bivuye ahandi. Biracari ahanini inkuru z'ubuhanga bw'ubumenyi.
kirundi.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Inyenyeri zishushe zisa n'ubururu; izikonje zisa n'umutuku. Inyenyeri zishirwa mu vyiciro OBAFGKM ku bwoko bwa sipekitoro.
kirundi.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Ubururu — inyenyeri zishushe kandi nke kurusha izindi, zibaho imyaka miliyoni gusa
kirundi.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Ibara ry'inyenyeri = ubushuhe. Uburyo bwo kwibuka urukurikirane rwa sipekitoro OBAFGKM (uhereye ku zishushe uja ku zikonje): 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Inyenyeri zishushe ni nini + zimurika kurushaho + zibaho igihe gito.
kirundi.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Fyonda kuri buri mwobo. Abahanga b'imibumbe babarura imyobo kugira ngo bamenye imyaka y'ubuso — imyobo myinshi = bwa kera kurushaho.
kirundi.click_craters_to_count_them: 🔍 Fyonda ku myobo kugira ngo uyibare
kirundi.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Kubara imyobo ni bwo buryo abahanga bamenya imyaka y'ubuso bw'imibumbe. Imyobo myinshi = ubuso bwa kera. Imisozi y'Ukwezi yuzuye imyobo (ya kera cane); ibibaya (maria) ni lave nshasha.
kirundi.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Impinduka z'ubushuhe za hafi 0.001% — imbuto z'imiterere yose
kirundi.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB ni urumuri rwasigaye rwo mu myaka 380,000 nyuma ya Big Bang. Impinduka ntoya z'ubushuhe zerekana aho ibintu vyari vyegeranye gato kurushaho. Utwo duce twegeranye twakuze tuba galagisi + inyenyeri zose tubona uyu munsi. Vyavumbuwe ku mpanuka na Penzias + Wilson mu 1965 (Igihembo ca Nobel 1978).
kirundi.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Impeta za Saturn ahanini ni uduce tw'urubura rw'amazi guhera ku mukungugu kugeza ku bice bingana n'inzu. Zirambuye ku km 282,000 ariko zifite ubugari buri munsi ya km 1. Bishoboka ko zavuye ku kwezi kwasenyutse mu myaka ~miliyoni 100 ishize — ni nshasha!
kirundi.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Raba ukoresheje AKAYUNGURUZO k'izuba KABIGENEWE gusa — NTUKIGERE URABA IZUBA WERA!
kirundi.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Kunyura kubaho iyo Mercury (canke Venus) inyuze hagati y'Isi + Izuba. Bisa n'akadomo gato kirabura ku Zuba. Kunyura kwa Mercury gukurikira: 13 Munyonyo 2032. Kunyura kwa Venus gukurikira: Kigarama 2117 — ntikuzongera kubaho kugeza 2125.
kirundi.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Impera y'amajaruguru ya Saturn ifite inkubi y'impande esheshatu itunganye y'ubugari bwa km 30,000. Yavumbuwe na Voyager mu 1981.
kirundi.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn ifite inkubi y'impande esheshatu itunganye ku mpera yayo y'amajaruguru — yafatiwe amashusho bwa mbere na Voyager (1981), vyemezwa na Cassini. Izo mpande esheshatu zifite ubugari bwa km 30,000 kandi zirahoraho. Kuki ari impande esheshatu? Imiterere y'umuyaga ukomeye wo mu kirere + imiraba ya Rossby.
kirundi.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Kwinjira mu kirere gusenya amabuye menshi ari munsi ya m 5. Chelyabinsk 2013 (m 20) yamennye amadirisha ariko nta mwobo. Tunguska 1908 (m 50) yahiritse ishamba rya km² 2000. Chicxulub imyaka miliyoni 66 ishize (km 10) yishe dinozoro.
kirundi.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Ama orbite atangura ku ruziga akagera ku ma elipsi maremare. Hindura eksantirisite ushushanye inzira zisa n'iz'imibumbe canke iz'inyenyeri z'imirizo.
kirundi.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Eksantirisite y'orbite iva kuri 0 (uruziga rutunganye) igera kuri 1 (kuva mu isanzure ku buryo bwa parabole). Imibumbe iri hafi y'uruziga. Inyenyeri z'imirizo zifite elipsi ikabije — zegera Izuba cane + zikaja kure mu isanzure ryo hanze. Ama orbite ya hiperbole (e>1) bivuze kunyura rimwe gusa muri sisitemu y'izuba.
kirundi.earth_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelengt: Ikirere c'Isi gihagarika uburabure bw'imiraba bwinshi. Urumuri rugaragara, radiyo, n'amadirisha amwe y'infarageru bigera hasi; ubumenyi bw'ikirere bwa UV, X, gama, n'infarageru nyinshi busaba ibigo vyo mu kirere nka Hubble, JWST, Chandra, na Fermi.
kirundi.spectra_reveal_temperature_composition_m: Sipekitoro zerekana ubushuhe, ibigize, ukugenda, n'ibimenyetso vy'iciciro c'iterambere c'ikintu.
kirundi.expanding_ejecta_thousands_km_s: Ibisohotse birimwo kwaguka: ibihumbi vya km/s
kirundi.spectral_line_strength_caution: Imbaraga z'umurongo si igipimo coroshe c'ubwinshi: ubushuhe, ubwinshi, na ionizasiyo na vyo bigena ibiranga bigaragara cane. Izi mbago ni moderi zoroshe zo kwigisha.
kirundi.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Fyonda unyure ku bintu 12 vy'ubumenyi bw'ikirere birenze ubwenge busanzwe.
kirundi.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Ibishushanyo vyo mu bitabo birabesha. Ukwezi kuri kure cane kurusha uko bishushanywa. Raba igipimo nyakuri.
kirundi.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bupfukirana imirongo mifunganye. Inzira y'ubwirakabiri bwo mu 2024 yanyuze mu majaruguru ya Maine.
kirundi.april_8_2024_total_solar_eclipse_path: Inzira y'Ubwirakabiri Bwuzuye bw'Izuba bwo ku ya 8 Ndamukiza 2024
kirundi.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bw'izuba bubaho gusa ku nzira nyoroheje z'ubugari bwa ~km 100-150. Ubwirakabiri bwo ku ya 8 Ndamukiza 2024 bwanyuze mu majaruguru ya Maine — Abanyamaine benshi bagiye mu majaruguru kubona ubwuzuye. Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bukurikira buzabonwa muri Maine: 1 Rusama 2079.
kirundi.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Kalendari y'Isanzure ya Carl Sagan: ihuza imyaka miliyari 13.8 mu mwaka 1. Big Bang = 1 Nzero. Ubu = 31 Kigarama saa sita z'ijoro. Abantu bagaragaye mu masegonda ya nyuma. Imico ibaho mu gice gito c'isegonda ya nyuma.
kirundi.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: Gereranya ivyiciro vy'ubushuhe bw'ubuso n'ibimenyetso vya sipekitoro bibiranga.
kirundi.spectral_class_size_caution: Ubunini bw'uduziga bwashizweho bungana ku bushake. Iciciro ca sipekitoro gisobanura ubushuhe n'imiterere y'imirongo, si rayo canke urumuri ubwarwo; iciciro c'urumuri V gisobanura urukurikirane rukuru, III gisobanura igihangange, na I gisobanura igihangange kinini.
kirundi.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Bishingiye ku uraba. Uburabure (hejuru y'aho ijisho rigarukira) + Azimut (uhereye mu majaruguru). Bikoreshwa mu kwerekeza telesikopi.
kirundi.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Inkuru zashizwe ku nyenyeri n'imico yo ku isi hose. Emu yo mu Kirere y'Abasangwabutaka ba Ositaraliya ikoresha ibicu vy'umukungugu w'umwijima. Abagenzi bo muri Polineziya bakoresha inyenyeri kugira ngo bayobore mu nyanja ya Pasifika bavyibutse. Ubumenyi bw'ikirere ni no kuvuga inkuru.
kirundi.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Exoplanet ya mbere hafi y'inyenyeri isa n'Izuba: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Ubu 6,300+ zemejwe. JWST irimwo gukora sipekitoroskopi y'ikirere kuri exoplanets — irondera ibimenyetso vy'ubuzima.
kirundi.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Ishirwa mu vyiciro rya Hubble: ibizunguruzi, elipsi, izidafite imiterere + ibiri hagati.
kirundi.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble yashize galagisi mu vyiciro mu 1936 — « ikanya ca Hubble ». Ibizunguruzi + elipsi + izidafite imiterere. Galagisi zikura zihurira — Nzira Nyamata iri hagati y'ubuzima bwayo; guhurira na Andromeda bishobora kuza mu myaka miliyari (ubushakashatsi bwo mu 2025 buvuga ko amahirwe ari hafi 50/50).
kirundi.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Raba inyenyeri zikorwa kuva ku mukungugu ukonje kugeza ku zuba rishushe. Ivyiciro 6 mu myaka miliyoni mike.
kirundi.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Kuva ku ruziga rw'ivyiciro vy'ukwezi kugeza ku mwerekanyi w'umwobo w'umukara kugeza kuri pandule ya Foucault, buri gikoresho cubatswe kugira ngo ivyiyumviro bidafatika bigaragare + bikinishwe.
kirundi.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: Cakorewe K-12 + abakuru bashaka kumenya. Ugurura ibikoresho vyose, canke kimwe gusa — buri kimwe gikora ubwaco.
kirundi.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Kuraba neza n'amaso yera: ahantu h'umwijima (kure y'amatara y'umuji), Ukwezi kuri munsi y'aho ijisho rigarukira, amaso yamenyereye umwijima (iminota 20-30 mu mwijima). Za porogaramu z'ubuntu: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk zifasha kumenya ico urimo kuraba.
kirundi.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Ivyiyumviro vya Carl Sagan bikunze kuvugwa kurusha ibindi. Pikiseli imwe irimwo buri wese twigeze kumenya.
kirundi.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 yafashe iyi foto y'Isi iri mu ntera ya km miliyari 6 ku ya 14 Ruhuhuma 1990 — vyasabwe na Carl Sagan. Isi ni pikiseli imwe. Buri muntu wese mu mateka yabayeho kuri iyo pikiseli.
kirundi.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: Ibisigazwa vya supernova yabonywe mu 1054 CE. Irimwo pulsar.
kirundi.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Ico ukeneye kugira ngo utangure kuraba — kuva kuri porogaramu z'ubuntu kugeza kuri telesikopi zihuye n'ingengo y'imari iyo ari yo yose.
kirundi.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Imiji myinshi ifite kimwe. Abanyamuryango batiza telesikopi, barigisha, bakanategura iminsi yo kuraba inyenyeri.
kirundi.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: Genda iminota 30+ mu modoka kure y'amatara y'umuji. Maine yuzuye ahantu nk'aho. Katahdin Woods and Waters ni ahantu hemewe h'ikirere c'umwijima.
kirundi.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine ifite ikirere c'umwijima ciza cane — cane cane mu majaruguru y'imiji. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM na AMC Maine Woods ni ahantu hemewe ku rwego mpuzamahanga h'ikirere c'umwijima; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, na Cobscook na ho ni h'umwijima mwiza. Amajoro y'itumba ni maremare + asobanutse neza.
kirundi.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Ubushakashatsi bw'ikirere buri mu ivugururwa rikomeye. Ibihugu bishasha (Ubuhinde, Ubuyapani, UAE), amasosiyete mashasha y'abikorera (SpaceX, Blue Origin), ubutumwa bushasha (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Raba hejuru — kandi utege amatwi.
kirundi.tip_when_you_read_an_astronomy_event_t: Impanuro: iyo usomye gahunda y'ibihe vy'ibikorwa vy'ubumenyi bw'ikirere, buri gihe raba nimba iri muri UTC canke mu gihe c'aho uri.
kirundi.utc_replaced_gmt_in_1972_based_on_atom: UTC yasimbuye GMT mu 1972. Ishingiye ku masaha ya atomike y'ibigo vy'igihugu ku isi hose, hafashwe impuzandengo. Amasegonda yiyongera ashirwaho igihe bikenewe.
kirundi.40_interactive_tools_to_explore_in_thi: Ibikoresho 40+ bikorana n'umukoresha vyo gushakashaka muri iyi porogaramu. Buri kimwe gifungura idirisha rishasha ku kintu c'isanzure.
kirundi.12_facts_that_defy_what_you_think_you_: Ibintu 12 bihakana ivyo wiyumvira ko uzi ku mibumbe.
kirundi.carl_sagan_frank_drake_linda_salzman_s: Carl Sagan + Frank Drake + Linda Salzman Sagan + abandi benshi ni bo babishushanyije. Komite ya Golden Record ya Voyager yarimo Ann Druyan — imiraba y'ubwonko bwe yashizwe muri iyo disiki.
kirundi.educational_use_share_freely_keep_curi: Gukoreshwa mu burezi — sangiza abandi ku buntu + ubandanye gushaka kumenya
kirundi.click_any_planet_in_the_3d_view_to_sel: Fyonda ku mubumbe uwo ari wo wose mu iraba rya 3D kugira ngo uwutoranye
